SHANA: Hey, you have a badge don't you?: SHANA: Hey, you have a badge don't you?

JAN: Not at all. \PN, this is Adrienn. Adrienn, \PN.

ADRIENN: Haha, sorry... I didn't mean to: ADRIENN: Haha, sorry... I didn't mean to put a damper on things.

You just got back to the city, right \\P: You just got back to the city, right \PN? Why don't I show you around?

JAN: There are other matters I must atte: JAN: There are other matters I must attend to. It was good to see you again, \PN.
By the way... Have you seen Amanda latel: By the way... Have you seen Amanda lately? I need to talk to her, but she won't answer my calls.

I should probably explain what happened...
My Starly and I were walking down by the: My Starly and I were walking down by the Petal Garden when some thugs ambushed me.
They took Starly because it's apparently: They took Starly because it's apparently an extremely rare Pokémon in northern Aevium.
They said they were going to sell Starly: They said they were going to sell Starly in the Artrica Region for a high price.

I just hope it's not too late... I love: I just hope it's not too late... I love that Starly so much.
Thank you so much, \\PN! Starly was able: Thank you so much, \PN! Starly was able to find its way back to me.
Your reward is ready for you at the Help: Your reward is ready for you at the Help Center.
Starly is safe with me now!: Starly is safe with me now!
???: Hm...? You don't even have a Pokémo: ???: Hm...? You don't even have a Pokémon with you!

HENRY: So, I was reading through some ol: HENRY: So, I was reading through some old historic text that talked about the history of Gearen.
There was one thing in particular that i: There was one thing in particular that interested me.
It detailed of a never ending library th: It detailed of a never ending library that had untold knowledge of ancient civilizations and Pokémon.
I believe one of the ancient civilizatio: I believe one of the ancient civilizations mentioned included the Garufa civilization.
If you are unaware of the Garufa civiliz: If you are unaware of the Garufa civilization, it was a group of people who were completely against Pokémon.
They thought of them as vile pests.
There's more to them than that, but that: There's more to them than that, but that's why I need help!
I need to know the secrets of the Garufa: I need to know the secrets of the Garufa.
I doubt we'll be able to find it right a: I doubt we'll be able to find it right away, but at least we can create some sort of lead.
There are three people I want you to gai: There are three people I want you to gain information from.
A woman behind this lab. The receptionis: A woman behind this lab. The receptionist at the Chrisola Hotel, and finally the leader of a local gang, Karrina.
HENRY: There are three people I want you: HENRY: There are three people I want you to gain information from.
HENRY: So what were your findings?: HENRY: So what were your findings?
Hm... yes, so the library was built to l: Hm... yes, so the library was built to last the greatest catastrophes.
Yes, this is very much true...
However, we do not know the circumstance: However, we do not know the circumstances of what their idea of a catastrophe was.
It's possible that they could not grasp: It's possible that they could not grasp the concept of an apocalyptic disaster occurring.
So what else have you found?: So what else have you found?
If that were the case, we would've found: If that were the case, we would've found the library decades ago!
Um, I don't think the library hates... p: Um, I don't think the library hates... people. The people who made it probably do, though.
Well the library needs to stop being a l: Well the library needs to stop being a little hipster if you ask me.

But that could've been figured out by ju: But that could've been figured out by just hearing what I said.
So Karrina hasn't found anything regardi: So Karrina hasn't found anything regarding the library in the tunnels of Gearen? Both Gearens?
Well, that gives me a lot of information: Well, that gives me a lot of information actually!
If it's nowhere in the tunnels, which ar: If it's nowhere in the tunnels, which are vast, that must mean it's either under unknown areas or...
In both cases, I am royally screwed.
That was all the information I needed. T: That was all the information I needed. Thanks for the help.
Your reward will be at the Help Center!: Your reward will be at the Help Center!
Sheridan Village has tunnels? Even so, g: Sheridan Village has tunnels? Even so, geographically speaking, that's impossible.
Hm... while a possibility, I don't think: Hm... while a possibility, I don't think this is the case...
What nonsense is this? There is historic: What nonsense is this? There is historical proof that this library exists.
If you're not going to take this serious: If you're not going to take this seriously, I suggest you take your lack of reward and leave.
... The Hidden Library. You know, the th: ... The Hidden Library. You know, the thing I told you to ask around about?
HENRY: I got a lot of information from y: HENRY: I got a lot of information from your intel. Thanks a lot!
I heard that Blakeory Co. has new types: I heard that Blakeory Co. has new types of Poké Balls in production.
Wonder what kind of inventions they're c: Wonder what kind of inventions they're coming up with?
STAFF: Sorry if I'm in the way. I have t: STAFF: Sorry if I'm in the way. I have to organize all of these emails...
My husband was on the S.S. Oceana, and n: My husband was on the S.S. Oceana, and now I'm not sure what to do...
I fear he may be dead.

AYA: Hey, I heard things with Witch went: AYA: Hey, I heard things with Witch went well. Good job.
Uh, anyway, I thought I would have anoth: Uh, anyway, I thought I would have another client ready by this point, but it seems that place isn't fully developed enough for companies.
Real assholes if you ask me. I mean, we: Real assholes if you ask me. I mean, we did a lot of work already.
But it's fine. We'll get some offers lat: But it's fine. We'll get some offers later, I'm sure.
That's about it, though. You've done you: That's about it, though. You've done your job and you've done it well.
Your reward will be ready for you at the: Your reward will be ready for you at the Help Plaza.
*Oshawott flashes their shell in the air: *Oshawott flashes their shell in the air.*

AMANDA: Hell yeah! That's a nice choice,: AMANDA: Hell yeah! That's a nice choice, \PN.

???: You know I don't appreciate being h: ???: You know I don't appreciate being hung up on like that.

Not that it particularly matters. Zetta: Not that it particularly matters. Zetta should be picking Melia up very soon.
